text: Alpha Mining supplies nickel matte to Beta Refining. Beta Refining supplies battery-grade nickel sulfate to Gamma Cathode. Gamma Cathode supplies cathode materials to Delta Cells.
Orion Electronics depends on Nova Components for power management ICs. Nova Components depends on Helios Silicon for wafers.
NVIDIA is located in Santa Clara. NVIDIA DGX Assembly Plant is located in Tijuana.
Hsinchu is located in Taiwan. Taiwan is located in East Asia. TSMC Fab 18 is located in Hsinchu.
Apple depends on TSMC for advanced chips. Samsung Foundry is an alternative to TSMC for advanced-node production.
Contoso Motors depends on Apex Battery Cells. Contoso Motors is affected by the Apex capacity shortage. The shortage increased battery lead time to 14 weeks.
NVIDIA ships through Port of Kaohsiung for outbound modules. Port of Kaohsiung connects to the Luzon Strait Route.
Before 2022, Acme Auto depended on OldChip. Since 2024, Acme Auto depends on NewChip. NewChip is an alternative to OldChip.
Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) supplies wafers to NVIDIA. TSMC Arizona is located in Phoenix.
The Taiwan Strait conflict affected TSMC operations. The Taiwan Strait conflict is located in Taiwan. TSMC is located in Taiwan. NVIDIA depends on TSMC.
Port of Shanghai is located in Shanghai. Shanghai is located in China. Pegatron ships through Port of Shanghai.
EcoGraphite supplies anode powder to UniAnode. UniAnode supplies anode material to VoltCell. VoltCell ships through Port of Busan.
